translations.ja: トイレが詰まっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking a feminine singular noun; introduces 'chiotte' as a specific referent.
Common noun, colloquial/vulgar term for a toilet; head of the noun phrase serving as sentence subject.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate; 3rd person singular present.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally) agreeing in gender and number with 'chiotte'; predicate complement after the copula.

sentences.target: On répare la chiotte avant les invités.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁepaʁ la ʃjɔt avɑ̃ lez ɛ̃vite/

translations.fr: On répare la chiotte avant les invités.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁepaʁ la ʃjɔt avɑ̃ lez ɛ̃vite/
translations.en: We fix the toilet before the guests.
translations.es: Arreglamos el inodoro antes de que lleguen los invitados.
translations.de: Wir reparieren die Toilette, bevor die Gäste kommen.
translations.it: Sistemiamo il water prima che arrivino gli ospiti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在客人来之前修马桶。
translations.yue: 我哋喺客人嚟之前整好馬桶。
translations.ru: Мы чиним унитаз перед приходом гостей.
translations.pt: Consertamos o vaso antes que os convidados cheguem.
translations.he: אנחנו מתקנים את האסלה לפני שהאורחים מגיעים.
translations.tr: Misafirler gelmeden önce klozeti tamir ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sửa bồn cầu trước khi khách đến.
translations.nl: We repareren het toilet voordat de gasten komen.
translations.uk: Ми лагодимо унітаз перед приходом гостей.
translations.hu: A vécét megjavítjuk, mielőtt megérkeznek a vendégek.
translations.hi: हम मेहमानों के आने से पहले टॉयलेट ठीक करते हैं.
translations.el: Φτιάχνουμε την τουαλέτα πριν έρθουν οι καλεσμένοι.
translations.nb: Vi fikser toalettet før gjestene kommer.
translations.id: Kami memperbaiki toilet sebelum para tamu datang.
translations.sv: Vi fixar toaletten innan gästerna kommer.
translations.ro: Reparăm toaleta înainte să vină oaspeții.
translations.cs: Opravíme záchod dřív, než přijdou hosté.
translations.da: Vi reparerer toilettet, før gæsterne kommer.
translations.fi: Korjaamme vessan ennen kuin vieraat tulevat.
translations.ja: 客が来る前にトイレを直します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun meaning 'we/one/people'; subject of the verb.
Main verb in the present tense (3rd person singular with 'on'); denotes the action of repairing.
Definite article marking a feminine singular noun; introduces the direct object 'chiotte'.
Common noun, colloquial/vulgar for toilet; direct object of 'répare'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement meaning precedence in time.
Definite article marking a plural noun; determines 'invités'.
Common noun, plural; complement of the preposition 'avant' indicating the reference event or group.

sentences.target: Je dois nettoyer la chiotte aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Je dois nettoyer la chiotte aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I have to clean the toilet today.
translations.es: Tengo que limpiar el inodoro hoy.
translations.de: Ich muss heute die Toilette putzen.
translations.pt: Tenho que limpar o vaso hoje.
translations.he: אני צריך לנקות את האסלה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi phải vệ sinh bồn cầu.
translations.nl: Ik moet vandaag het toilet schoonmaken.
translations.hu: Ma meg kell takarítanom a vécét.
translations.hi: मुझे आज टॉयलेट साफ करना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να καθαρίσω την τουαλέτα σήμερα.
translations.nb: Jeg må vaske toalettet i dag.
translations.id: Saya harus membersihkan toilet hari ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste städa toaletten i dag.
translations.da: Jeg skal gøre toilettet rent i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はトイレを掃除しなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 1st person singular subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing obligation; selects an infinitive ('nettoyer') as its complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of the modal 'devoir'; denotes the action to be performed.
Definite article marking a feminine singular noun; introduces the direct object 'chiotte'.
Common noun, colloquial/vulgar for toilet; direct object of 'nettoyer'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; specifies the time of the action.

sentences.target: Tu vérifies la chiotte avant de dormir.
sentences.reading: /ty veʁifi la ʃjɔt avɑ̃ də dɔʁmiʁ/

translations.fr: Tu vérifies la chiotte avant de dormir.
translations.ipa: /ty veʁifi la ʃjɔt avɑ̃ də dɔʁmiʁ/
translations.en: You check the toilet before bed.
translations.es: Revisas el inodoro antes de dormir.
translations.de: Du kontrollierst die Toilette vor dem Schlafengehen.
translations.it: Controlli il water prima di andare a letto.
translations.yue: 瞓覺前你檢查一下馬桶。
translations.pt: Você confere o vaso antes de dormir.
translations.he: אתה בודק את האסלה לפני השינה.
translations.vi: Bạn kiểm tra bồn cầu trước khi đi ngủ.
translations.nl: Je controleert het toilet voor het slapengaan.
translations.hi: सोने से पहले तुम टॉयलेट जांचते हो.
translations.el: Ελέγχεις την τουαλέτα πριν τον ύπνο.
translations.nb: Du sjekker toalettet før du legger deg.
translations.sv: Du kollar toaletten innan du går och lägger dig.
translations.ja: 寝る前にトイレを確認する。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 2nd person singular subject of the clause.
Main verb in the present tense (2nd person singular); denotes the action of verifying/checking.
Definite article introducing 'chiotte' as the direct object.
Common noun, colloquial/vulgar for toilet; direct object of 'vérifies'.
Preposition introducing a temporal phrase indicating prior action.
Preposition linking the infinitive 'dormir' to 'avant' in the construction 'avant de + infinitif'.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of the prepositional phrase 'avant de'.
